label: The Vanishing Suite
description: The Vanishing Suite is a compact sleeping chamber cut into the Null Cantina’s glass-dark composite, its surfaces scored with the same repeating cell-grids that discipline the Anchorage. Ceiling filaments run in rectilinear lines that terminate in shuttered nodes, allowing the room’s intervals to be precisely extinguished or measured in hard-edged light. A recessed berth and fold-down work ledge are integrated into the wall plane, their edges chamfered to match the lattice geometry and leave the floor unbroken. A narrow mooring-view slit is set behind a glare-damping baffle, reducing the Cosmos beyond to a controlled band of ordered radiance.
